'''Yavin: The Big Red One''' was a ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series published from [[July]] to [[August]] [[2004]], covering the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]. The articles were written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published to [[Wizards.com]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: Giant===
''…[[Suz Tanwa]] hitches a ride and hits paydirt deep within the turbulent atmosphere of mighty [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]].''<ref name="Yavin" />

===Part 2: Lucky Thirteen===
''…our treasure-hunting heroine encounters unexpected natives and the face of her long-dead ancestor on bone-dry [[Yavin 13/Legends|Yavin 13]].''<ref name="Yavin" />

===Part 3: Crazy Eight===
''…something fishy is going on in the freshwater lakes riddling the mountain ranges of icy [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]].''<ref name="Yavin" />

===Part 4: Four Sighted===
''…treasure hunter and [[Xenoarchaeology|xenoarchaeologist]] Suz Tanwa visits the part of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] no one ever goes to see -- the part without the gigantic temples.''<ref name="Yavin" />

===Part 5: Twenty-Two Catch===
''…our heroine meets an old friend and makes one last amazing discovery on the tiny captured [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] known as [[Yavin 22]].''<ref name="Yavin" />
